So Bernard is the only penguin younger than Louis. The options given are (B) Bernard. I need to check if there's any other penguin younger. James is one of the options, but in the table provided, there's no penguin named James. The table lists Louis, Bernard, Vincent, and Gwen. So James isn't in the data.
